title: payments-v1
description: Payments service contract v1 — 36 operations spanning one-time payments, refunds, customers, cards-on-file, locations, orders, catalog, inventory, disputes, and webhook events. Sibling to billing-v1 (subscription-shaped). First implementer: square-blade-mcp. Future implementers: Stripe Payments, Adyen, Braintree.

operations.name: payment_create
operations.description: Charge a payment source (token, card-on-file, gift card)

operations.name: payment_get
operations.description: Fetch a payment by id

operations.name: payment_list
operations.description: List payments with location, customer, date-range, status filters (cursor-paginated)

operations.name: payment_cancel
operations.description: Cancel a delayed-capture or authorisation

operations.name: payment_complete
operations.description: Capture a previously-authorised payment

operations.name: refund_create
operations.description: Refund a payment in full or part

operations.name: refund_get
operations.description: Fetch a refund by id

operations.name: refund_list
operations.description: List refunds with payment, date-range, status filters

operations.name: customer_create
operations.description: Create a customer record

operations.name: customer_get
operations.description: Fetch a customer by id

operations.name: customer_list
operations.description: List or search customers

operations.name: customer_update
operations.description: Update customer fields

operations.name: card_list
operations.description: List cards-on-file for a customer (returns last_4, brand, exp_month, exp_year, fingerprint; never PAN)

operations.name: card_create
operations.description: Save a card-on-file from a payment source token

operations.name: card_disable
operations.description: Disable a saved card (soft-disable; use card_delete for hard removal)

operations.name: location_list
operations.description: List merchant locations (POS, online, physical)

operations.name: order_create
operations.description: Create an order with line items, taxes, fulfilments

operations.name: order_get
operations.description: Fetch an order by id

operations.name: order_list
operations.description: Search orders with location, customer, date-range, state filters

operations.name: order_pay
operations.description: Pay an existing order using a payment source

operations.name: order_update
operations.description: Update line items, fulfilment state, metadata

operations.name: catalog_list
operations.description: List catalog items, variations, modifiers, taxes

operations.name: catalog_get
operations.description: Fetch a catalog object by id

operations.name: inventory_count
operations.description: Get inventory counts for items at a location

operations.name: dispute_list
operations.description: List chargebacks and disputes

operations.name: dispute_get
operations.description: Fetch a dispute by id with evidence and timeline

operations.name: customer_delete
operations.description: Hard-delete a customer (PCI scope; account-deletion semantics)

operations.name: card_delete
operations.description: Hard-delete a saved card (use card_disable for reversible removal)

operations.name: payment_void
operations.description: Void an authorised payment outright (no settlement, no audit trail)

operations.name: refund_unlinked
operations.description: Issue a refund without a backing payment (high fraud risk; provider-specific)

operations.name: inventory_adjust
operations.description: Adjust inventory count at a location (physical-state mutation)

operations.name: webhook_subscription_delete
operations.description: Delete a webhook subscription (removes audit trail of event delivery)

operations.name: webhook_subscription_list
operations.description: List webhook subscriptions

operations.name: webhook_subscription_create
operations.description: Create a webhook subscription with notification URL and event filter

operations.name: webhook_event_types
operations.description: Enumerate event types the provider can emit (drives Stallari dispatch wiring per DD-159)

operations.name: webhook_verify
operations.description: Verify signature on a received webhook payload; returns {verified: bool, event: ParsedEvent}. Provider-specific extras passed via params object (Square requires notification_url; Stripe requires timestamp).
